meta.title: Dark Core Personality Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: Discover your dark core personality. Measure your dark triad traits: Narcissism, Machiavellianism, Psychopathy, and Sadism.

app.title: Dark Core Test
app.subtitle: How dark is your personality?
app.description: Answer 12 dark scenarios to reveal your Dark Core. Measure your Narcissism, Machiavellianism, Psychopathy, and Sadism. Are you Pure Light or an Abyss Dweller?

q1.text: A friend achieves something you've always wanted

q2.text: You notice your reflection in a shop window

q4.c: Use it subtly to gain favor

q5.text: A group project needs a leader
q5.b: Volunteer if no one else does
q5.c: Manipulate the vote in your favor

q6.text: You can get ahead by bending the rules
q6.c: Bend freely if no one's watching

q7.text: Someone cuts in line ahead of you
q7.d: Cut in front of someone else

q8.text: You find a wallet with cash and ID
q8.c: Take the cash, toss the wallet

q9.text: A stranger is struggling with heavy bags

q10.text: Your rival fails at something important

q11.a: Play fair, fun is what matters
q11.b: Try to win within the rules

q12.text: A movie villain explains their evil plan
q12.d: Wish you could execute that plan

light.name: Pure Light
light.desc: Your soul is remarkably pure. You genuinely care about others and consistently choose the ethical path. The darkness has no hold on you.

grey.name: Grey Zone
grey.desc: A healthy balance of light and shadow. You have some darker impulses but keep them in check. Most humans live here — and that's perfectly normal.

shadow.name: Shadow Walker
shadow.desc: You walk the line between light and dark. Your shadow side is active and influential. You know how to use it when needed.

dark.name: Dark Architect
dark.desc: A powerful dark core drives your decisions. You see the world as a chessboard and people as pieces. Strategic, calculated, unapologetic.

abyss.name: Abyss Dweller
abyss.desc: Your dark core is fully awakened. You embrace the void and the void embraces you back. The abyss doesn't just stare — it smiles.

share.title: Share Your Dark Core
share.text: My Dark Core score is {score}%! I'm a '{tier}' 🖤 Find out yours:
